case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. NATE COLLIER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE LOSS OF ORIGINAL LEASE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
